r1_r2_contradictions.r1_fix: I5: added process.exit(2) for API failures per Qodo review
r1_r2_contradictions.r2_flag: Pattern Compliance BLOCK: 'no exit 2, codes 2+ have signal semantics'
r1_r2_contradictions.resolution: Fixed internally-inconsistent pattern checker rule signal-exit-code [2-9] -> [3-9] to match CODE_PATTERNS.md

r1_r2_contradictions.r1_fix: I17: added actor: process.env.USER || os.userInfo().username for audit trail
r1_r2_contradictions.r2_flag: Qodo Compliance RED: 'raw username is PII, violates no-sensitive-data-in-logs'
r1_r2_contradictions.resolution: SHA-256 hash of username (first 8 chars) via resolveActorHash() helper — preserves per-user attribution without raw PII

regex -> testFn with backward statSync+size-check detection
